revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-400

The upper part of a system used to place concrete underwater without segregation.


Note: The lowest part of the hopper connects to a tremie pipe or spout leading beneath the water to the desired location. The complete system is called a tremie.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Tremie hopper}}
